title: Quantum Control Configuration
description: Schema for configuring wire maps, quantum dot configs, instrument APIs, Lua libraries, and backend services.

wiremap.description: Path to the wiremap configuration file.

quantum-dot-config.description: Path to the quantum dot configuration file.

inst-config.description: Semicolon-separated paths to instrument configuration files (e.g. /path/a.yml;/path/b.yml), or a directory containing all instrument configuration files.

lua-library-types.description: Path to Lua library type definitions.

user-measurement-luas.description: Directory containing user-defined measurement Lua scripts.

local-database.description: Root directory for the local database.

instrument-server-port.description: Port used by the instrument server.
